title: esdra sessilis
intro: Esdra sessilis, also known as dwarf esdra, is a small, flowering plant that belongs to the family Compositae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and immune-boosting properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Esdra sessilis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
